name: laya-ecs-kickshrew
description: Kick Shrew game with bitECS + Dirty Binding + Laya rendering

scripts.build:debug: npx tsc -p tsconfig.debug.json && node scripts/fix-esm-extensions.js && node scripts/copy-vendor.js && node scripts/copy-hero-resources.js
scripts.debug:ready: npm run build:debug && npm run debug:serve
